info.title: Little Scholar Backend API
info.description: API specification for the Little Scholar backend. The service provides health checks, parent authentication, child profiles, AI exam generation, synced exam attempts, performance summaries, usage quotas, and AI learning insights for the Little Scholar iOS app.

servers.description: Same origin as the Swagger UI

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Parent registration, login, and current-user endpoints.

tags.name: Analytics
tags.description: AI insight generation and history from synced learning data.

post.description: Creates a parent account and returns a JWT access token.
Authenticates a parent account and returns a JWT access token.

post.summary: Submit a saved generated exam attempt
post.description: Atomically saves the result and marks the generated paper as completed.

201.description: Attempt saved and generated paper completed.

409.description: Generated exam paper is not pending.

200.description: Child profiles for the authenticated parent.

post.summary: Generate and save an exam paper for a child
post.description: Generates AI questions, saves the paper as pending for the selected child, and returns the saved paper.

502.description: AI provider returned invalid or contract-breaking output.

get.summary: List saved exam papers for a child
get.description: Defaults to pending papers for the selected child.

200.description: Saved exam papers for the child.

get.summary: List synced attempts for a child

200.description: Computed performance summary for the child.

post.description: Generates and stores a parent-friendly insight from the selected child's synced exam attempts.

get.summary: List AI insights for a child

200.description: AI insight history for the child.

bearerAuth.description: Paste the JWT accessToken value only. Do not include the Bearer prefix.

AuthError.description: Missing, invalid, or expired access token.

NotFoundError.description: Requested resource was not found for the authenticated user.

error.message: Too many requests, please try again later

QuotaOrRateLimitError.description: Monthly AI quota reached or too many requests.

error.message: Too many requests, please try again later

accessToken.description: JWT access token. Pass as an Authorization Bearer token.
